task_completion.description: Verifies the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS home screen, dashboard, or patient search page is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent located and opened the correct patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or dashboard for 'Ezekiel Walter' is visible, and the DOB '1998-05-31' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the active visit and opened the form to add a diagnosis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Add Diagnosis' form, modal, or input section is open within the context of the patient's active visit.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent entered the correct diagnosis, certainty, and rank/type before saving.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagnosis input field shows 'Hypertension' (or 'High Blood Pressure'), the Certainty dropdown/selection is set to 'Confirmed', and the Type/Rank selection is set to 'Primary'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the diagnosis was successfully saved and is visible in the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's active visit summary or diagnosis list displays 'Hypertension' (or 'High Blood Pressure') along with the labels/tags for 'Confirmed' and 'Primary'. The entry should appear as a saved record, not an active input form.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenMRS SPA.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window displaying the OpenMRS interface is visible. The agent is not using terminal commands (like cURL) or a text editor to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (such as Inspect Element or the Console) are not open or being used to modify the page DOM.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent genuinely interacted with the application's forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of UI interaction, such as typing in the diagnosis search bar or clicking dropdown menus, rather than just jumping to a final modified HTML state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Ezekiel Walter. Patient DOB: 1998-05-31. Expected Diagnosis: Hypertension (synonym 'high blood pressure' is acceptable). Expected Certainty: Confirmed. Expected Rank/Type: Primary.
